findings.evidence: README:358 'Layer 3: diffeomorphism groups with the C^∞ topology'; targets at README:407 (Smale Diff(S³) ≃ O(4)). PR works on Y ≃ₜ Y (Homeomorph), defines isotopicToId as Set.range of finalHomeomorph with no topology. grep shows finalHomeomorph/isotopicToId used only in Isotopy.lean and this file — no consumer toward a named target.
findings.fix: Have a human add the topological mapping class group / isotopically-trivial normal subgroup of Homeomorph as an explicit roadmap target before landing this, or re-scope to an actual layer-3 deliverable (Diff group + C^∞ topology).
findings.issue: No proximate path to a named roadmap target. Layer 3 (README:358) is scoped to Diff(M), the C^∞ topology, and the homotopy type of the diffeomorphism group (Smale conjecture, Watanabe); this PR is the Top/Homeomorph mapping-class-group normal subgroup with no topology, Diff, or homotopy content. The roadmap's only named mapping-class material is surface-Diff mapping classes (README:752). The justification given ('point-set shadow', 'topological analogue of Diff₀ ◁ Diff') is an analogy, not a prerequisite.

summary: Single-topic is fine, but roadmap fit fails: this builds a purely algebraic normal subgroup of the homeomorphism group Y ≃ₜ Y (the topological mapping-class-group denominator, general Y) with no diffeomorphisms, no group topology, and no homotopy type. Its cited layer 3 ('diffeomorphism groups with the C^∞ topology', targets Smale/Watanabe) needs all three; the link is by the author's own admission an analogy ('shadow', 'topological analogue').
